title: reseda stricta subsp. funkii
intro: Reseda stricta subsp. funkii, also known as the Funk's reseda or Funk's burnet, is a plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal burns, wounds, and skin irritations. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, which can help to prevent infection and promote tissue repair. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Reseda stricta subsp. funkii are often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to affected areas to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
